faqs.question: Why are flies so common in Sunset Park?
faqs.answer: Sunset Park's dense population, numerous restaurants and food markets along 8th Avenue and 5th Avenue, proximity to Industry City warehouses, and older building infrastructure create ideal breeding conditions for flies.
